caption: A man with dark skin is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a small red bow tie, and a large, grey, stylized wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and looks slightly to his left while speaking. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. To his left, a logo displays "BOSS TALK JOY" with the word "PODCAST" written below it. The background consists of a wall adorned with framed photographs and various clothing items on hangers, including pieces with the brand name "LEE." A white rectangular board is also visible behind him. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, with subtle movements in his facial expression and head posture as he continues to talk, while the background and equipment remain static.
